description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named wasm that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to master, and on workflow dispatch. In an ubuntu-latest job, check out the code, set up Emscripten, verify the setup, install PlatformIO, build the project with Emscripten, scan for wasm/js/html artifacts, prepare artifacts for upload, and generate a timestamp and random hex. Then, upload the wasm artifacts with a uniquely generated name based on timestamp, SHA, and random hex.
